result:
Here's a precise map of how POS billing works in this codebase:

---

## Core Files & Entry Points

### Routes
- **`app/Http/routes*.php`** — Route definitions mapping billing endpoints

### Key Endpoints
| Endpoint | Handler |
|----------|---------|
| `POST /v1/merchant/{storeID}/postOrd` | `OrderController@postOrder` — main POS order placement |
| `POST /v2/merchant/{chainID}/PI` | `v2\BillingWeb@postPI` — proforma invoice creation |
| `POST /v2/merchant/{chainID}/createSalesOrderWeb` | `v2\BillingWeb` — web billing order |
| `POST /v2/merchant/{chainID}/convertSalesOrderToInvoice` | Sales order → invoice conversion |
| `POST /v1/merchant/{chainID}/postGlobalOrder` | Global (chain-level) order |

---

## Controllers
| File | Role |
|------|------|
| **`app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php`** (4424 lines) | Core order processing |
| **`app/Http/Controllers/v2/BillingWeb.php`** (~3000+ lines) | v2 web billing — PI creation, stock holding, sales orders |
| **`app/Http/Controllers/appController.php`** | Mobile app billing endpoints |
| **`app/Http/Controllers/basicAppController.php`** | Basic app billing |

---

## Core Order Model
**`app/Order.php`** (~30,000+ lines) — the heart of billing:

| Function | Line | Purpose |
|----------|------|---------|
| `postOrder($storeID, $dataArray)` | ~7915 | **Main entry point** — validates, creates order, processes payment, triggers jobs |
| `createOrderSummary($storeID, $chainID, $dataArray)` | ~4724 | Inserts into `orderSummary` table |
| `createOrderDetail($storeID, $dataArray)` | ~5242 | Inserts line items into `orderDetail` |
| `createOrderAccounting($storeID, $dataArray)` | ~4714 | GL accounting / tax entries |
| `postGlobalOrder($chainID, ...)` | ~13405 | Chain-level order sync |
| `settleOrder($storeID, $dataArray)` | ~17083 | Finalizes payment settlement |
| `postAdvancePayment($chainID, $dataArray)` | ~3504 | Advance payment handling |

**`app/v2/Order.php`** — v2 order model with `getOrderDetail()`.

---

## Order Flow (simplified)

```
1. API Request → OrderController / BillingWeb
2. Validation (storeID↔chainID, payload, product availability)
3. Order.php::postOrder()
   ├── createOrderSummary()  → {storeID}_orderSummary
   ├── createOrderDetail()   → {storeID}_orderDetail
   ├── createOrderAccounting() → {storeID}_orderAccounting
   └── Payment records       → {storeID}_orderPayments
4. Async Jobs dispatched:
   ├── GlobalOrderJob (chain-level sync)
   ├── StockJob (inventory deduction)
   ├── SendOrderReceiptJob (receipt via email/SMS)
   ├── SendInvoiceJob
   └── Integration jobs (EasyEcom, Unicommerce, ZOHO, etc.)
5. Response with orderID, invoice number, status
```

---

## Supporting Files

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| **`app/Receipts.php`** | Receipt/invoice template generation (`prepareInvoiceTemplateData()`) |
| **`app/OnlineOrder.php`** | Online/omnichannel order handling |
| **`app/Inventory.php`** | Stock management, batch tracking |
| **`app/Services/PaymentMappingService.php`** | Payment method config across stores |
| **`app/Services/InvoiceNumberService.php`** | Invoice number generation |
| **`app/Services/OrderSyncFailureService.php`** | Order sync error handling |
| **`app/Services/OrderDeletionService.php`** | Order cleanup/deletion |
| **`app/Helpers/OrderValidator.php`** | Request validation (v3) |
| **`app/Helpers/ResponseFormatter.php`** | Standardized responses (v3) |

---

## Key Async Jobs
| Job | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| `app/Jobs/GlobalOrderJob.php` | Sync order to chain level |
| `app/Jobs/GlobalOrderJobSettle.php` | Settlement sync |
| `app/Jobs/StockJob.php` | Inventory deduction |
| `app/Jobs/SendOrderReceiptJob.php` | Receipt dispatch |
| `app/Jobs/SendInvoiceJob.php` | Invoice dispatch |
| `app/Jobs/VoidOrderJob.php` | Order cancellation |
| `app/Jobs/CaptureRazorpayPaymentsJob.php` | Payment gateway capture |
| `app/Jobs/EcomVoidOrderPaymentRefundJob.php` | Refund processing |

---

## Database Tables (multi-tenant: `{storeID}_` or `{chainID}_` prefix)

- **`orderSummary`** — order header (amounts, status, customer, timestamps)
- **`orderDetail`** — line items (product, qty, price, modifiers, combos)
- **`orderPayments`** — payment modes and amounts per order
- **`orderAccounting`** — GL entries, tax breakdowns
- **`PISummary` / `PIPayments`** — proforma invoices
- **`invoiceSummary`** — final invoices
- **`paymentSettings`** — payment method config per store
- **`customerLedger`** — customer transaction history

The central file is **`app/Order.php`** — almost everything flows through `postOrder()`.
